ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "length" REAL /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the route */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "actual_time" REAL /* Actual travel time for the route (for historical data) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the route */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the route */,
  "route_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transportation mode used for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_to_location FOREIGN KEY ("to_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_route_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_mode_id") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_from_location FOREIGN KEY ("from_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode (e.g., road, rail, sea) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the transportation mode */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the transportation mode */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor for the transportation mode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the mode */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, train, ship) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "transportation_mode" INTEGER /* Reference to the transportation mode used by the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "vin_number" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year_manufactured" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the vehicle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transportation_mode FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_mode") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the driver's license */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the driver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the driver */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispatchers" (
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispatcher */,
  "dispatcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the dispatcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dispatcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dispatcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dispatcher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the dispatcher was hired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dispatcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dispatcher was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the dispatcher */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the dispatcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route assignment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route assigned */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the route was assigned */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time for the route */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time for the route */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the assignment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route affected */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assignment affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., route change, vehicle change) */,
  "previous_route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous route before the change */,
  "previous_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous vehicle before the change */,
  "previous_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous driver before the change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the history entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_previous_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES route_assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_previous_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_previous_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, driver, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_routes, assign_routes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
